candidate_paradigm.primary_mechanism: ultrapower construction: 𝒰 = non-principal ultrafilter on ℕ (existence by Zorn lemma / AC); *ℝ := ∏_{n∈ℕ} ℝ / ~_𝒰 where (a_n) ~_𝒰 (b_n) ⟺ {n : a_n=b_n} ∈ 𝒰. operations componentwise: (a_n)+(b_n)=(a_n+b_n), (a_n)·(b_n)=(a_n·b_n), (a_n)≤(b_n) ⟺ {n:a_n≤b_n}∈𝒰. Łoś theorem: ⟦Φ⟧^{*ℝ}=true ⟺ {n:⟦Φ(a_n)⟧^ℝ=true}∈𝒰 (first-order formula transfer). Specific elements: standard r ∈ ℝ embedded as (r,r,r,...) constant sequence; infinitesimal ε := (1, 1/2, 1/3, ...)/~_𝒰 satisfies ε>0 ∧ ε<1/n ∀n∈ℕ_standard (verify: {k:1/k<1/n} = {k:k>n} ∈ 𝒰 since cofinite ⊂ 𝒰); infinite hyperreal ω := (1, 2, 3, ...)/~_𝒰 = 1/ε. Standard part map st: *ℝ_finite → ℝ where st(x) = unique r∈ℝ with x-r infinitesimal (well-defined on finite hyperreals by Dedekind completeness of ℝ). Derivative redefinition: f'(x) := st((f(x+ε)-f(x))/ε) for any nonzero infinitesimal ε (independent of choice by transfer of ε-δ standard definition).
